subject: A minotaur pilot gripping vehicle controls inside a cockpit, mid-race with blue aether exhaust streaming behind
description: A bullheaded minotaur driver leans forward over the steering yoke of a racing vehicle, horns curving back, jaw set in a snarl. The cockpit and figure are rendered in hot reds and oranges, while a plume of blue-cyan aether exhaust trails behind, suggesting acceleration. The composition is tight on the driver, framing the action from a low forward angle that emphasizes speed and aggression. The minotaur's musculature is exaggerated and his grip on the controls is white-knuckled. The overall palette is a red-vs-blue contrast: combustion on the figure, cold propulsion in the wake.
background: blue aether exhaust plume and motion-blurred cockpit interior
emotion: snarling aggression, focused fury, do-or-die intensity
